Deprecated API

Contents

  • Terminally Deprecated
  • Interfaces
  • Annotation Interfaces
  • Methods
  • Terminally Deprecated Elements
    Element
    Description
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.data.FluidData.of()
    use FluidData.of(Unit)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.data.FluidData.of(int)
    use FluidData.of(Unit, int)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IBlockAccessor.getServerData()
    use IBlockAccessor.getData(), IDataReader.raw()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.ICommonAccessor.getServerData()
    use ICommonAccessor.getData(), IDataReader.raw()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IEntityAccessor.getServerData()
    use IEntityAccessor.getData(), IDataReader.raw()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.addBlockData(IServerDataProvider<BE>, Class<T>)
    use IRegistrar.addBlockData(IDataProvider, Class)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.addEntityData(IServerDataProvider<E>, Class<T>)
    use IRegistrar.addEntityData(IDataProvider, Class)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.addMergedConfig(ResourceLocation, boolean)
    use IRegistrar.addFeatureConfig(ResourceLocation, boolean)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.addMergedSyncedConfig(ResourceLocation, boolean, boolean)
    use IRegistrar.addFeatureConfig(ResourceLocation, boolean)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IServerDataProvider
    use IDataProvider instead.
  • Deprecated Interfaces
    Interface
    Description
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IObjectPicker
    use IRayCastVectorProvider
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IPickerAccessor
    use IRayCastVectorProvider
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IPickerResults
    use IRayCastVectorProvider
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IServerDataProvider
    use IDataProvider instead.
  • Deprecated Annotation Interfaces
    Annotation Interface
    Description
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.WailaPlugin
    use waila_plugins.json file, see IWailaPlugin javadocs for more info.

    Method
    Description
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.data.FluidData.of()
    use FluidData.of(Unit)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.data.FluidData.of(int)
    use FluidData.of(Unit, int)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IBlockAccessor.getHitResult()
    use IBlockAccessor.getBlockHitResult()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IBlockAccessor.getPartialFrame()
    use IBlockAccessor.getFrameTime()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IBlockAccessor.getServerData()
    use IBlockAccessor.getData(), IDataReader.raw()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.ICommonAccessor.getPartialFrame()
    use ICommonAccessor.getFrameTime()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.ICommonAccessor.getServerData()
    use ICommonAccessor.getData(), IDataReader.raw()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IEntityAccessor.getHitResult()
    use IEntityAccessor.getEntityHitResult()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IEntityAccessor.getPartialFrame()
    use IEntityAccessor.getFrameTime()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IEntityAccessor.getServerData()
    use IEntityAccessor.getData(), IDataReader.raw()
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.addBlockData(IServerDataProvider<BE>, Class<T>)
    use IRegistrar.addBlockData(IDataProvider, Class)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.addEntityData(IServerDataProvider<E>, Class<T>)
    use IRegistrar.addEntityData(IDataProvider, Class)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.addMergedConfig(ResourceLocation, boolean)
    use IRegistrar.addFeatureConfig(ResourceLocation, boolean)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.addMergedSyncedConfig(ResourceLocation, boolean, boolean)
    use IRegistrar.addFeatureConfig(ResourceLocation, boolean)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.replacePicker(IObjectPicker)
    use IRegistrar.addRayCastVector(IRayCastVectorProvider, int)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.IRegistrar.replacePicker(IObjectPicker, int)
    use IRegistrar.addRayCastVector(IRayCastVectorProvider, int)
    mcp.mobius.waila.api.ITooltipComponent.HorizontalGrowing.getWidth()
    width is dynamically calculated.
